scope: Deterministic router policy without runtime implementation

rules.llm_last_resort_statement: LLM is allowed only after cache, rules, and rag fail to resolve with minimum evidence.

resolve_criteria.description: Action is classified, all mandatory gates pass, and execution plan is safe to dispatch.
Response has no side effects and includes sufficient evidence references when required.
Request is denied with explicit policy or guard reason.

ask.description: Request one critical missing datum only and pause execution.

safe_response.description: Return non-executable guidance with no side effects.
